title: Huepar Pro Laser Level, 4 * 360 Self Levelling Laser Leveler, High Accuracy Professional Green Laser Level with 8000mAh Rechargeable Li-ion Battery, Multifunctional Stand and Hard Case
features: 【Professional ±2mm Accuracy & Long-Lasting 8000mAh Battery】 Achieve ±2mm high accuracy at 10 metres with working range up to 30m(100 LUX). 33% more accurate than standard laser levels, delivering professional results for demanding installations. Class 2 laser (<1mW, compliant with IEC/EN60825-1/2014) ensures safe operation. Powered by a high-capacity 8000mAh rechargeable Li-ion battery providing at least 8 hours of runtime with all four 360° laser lines operating simultaneously—no more battery anxiety on site.

【Ultra-Bright Green Laser with Extended Outdoor Range 200m】 Features an upgraded ultra-bright laser diode that projects a significantly brighter green beam than most laser levels. When paired with the Huepar Pro LR300 receiver, the powerful laser beam dramatically extends the effective working range for outdoor use (Receiver sold separately). Please note: The laser beam may be difficult to see in direct sunlight; always activate pulse mode outdoors and use the receiver outdoors for best results.

【Fast 3-Second Self-Levelling with Dual Mode Operation】 Self-levelling Mode: Unlock the pendulum for automatic levelling within ±3° in just 3 seconds. If the range is exceeded, the unit emits a beep and the laser lines flash rapidly as an alert. Manual Mode: Lock the pendulum to project laser lines at any desired angle for slopes or custom applications. Use the H and V buttons on the keypad to independently control each of the four 360° laser lines.

【Convenient Remote Control & Versatile Magnetic Bracket】 The included remote allows you to activate/deactivate Pulse Mode and switch between the four laser lines from up to 10 metres away, eliminating the need to walk back and forth for adjustments. The magnetic bracket securely attaches to metal surfaces and features fine-tuning knobs for precise adjustment (up/down, left/right, forward/backward, and 360° rotation). The bracket is equipped with both 1/4"-20 and 5/8"-11 threads at the base for mounting on tripods or pole stands. The laser unit itself also features a 1/4"-20 thread for tripod mounting.

【Premium Build Quality & Rugged IP54 Design】 Solid, substantial weight with excellent build quality. All laser windows feature rugged metal construction, and the body is wrapped in shock-absorbing soft rubber for impact protection. Tightly crafted with an IP54 rating for water and dust resistance, designed to withstand harsh job site conditions. Backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty for complete peace of mind.
